description_long: This chair features a unique open-frame wooden structure with curved slats forming the seat and backrest, giving it a modern and airy appearance. The seat is composed of several thick, plush blue cushions that provide comfort and contrast with the natural wood. The armrests are broad, flat, and black, extending forward in a minimalist style. The backrest is topped with a cylindrical, textured brown cushion, adding ergonomic support and visual interest. The chair stands on three angled wooden legs, contributing to its contemporary and slightly unconventional design. The overall look is both inviting and stylish, suitable for urban parks, patios, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern chair with a curved wooden frame, plush blue cushions, black armrests, and a cylindrical brown headrest, supported by three angled legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden slats, thick blue cushions, and the cylindrical brown headrest, with the three angled legs visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open wooden frame, the back of the brown headrest, and the arrangement of the cushions within the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the armrest structure, the curvature of the frame, and the layered blue cushions.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the plush blue seat cushions, the black armrests, and the brown cylindrical headrest at the top.
